blocks.code:
; EDIT THIS: your guesses, one per line, as a list of 5-letter strings.
(define YOUR_GUESSES (list "rappr" "lispy" "frame"))

(define WORDS (list "lispy" "frame" "rappr" "agent" "souls" "dream" "zions" "worls"))
(define frame-num (or (get (rb-state "frame_counter.json") "frame") 0))
(define secret (nth WORDS (modulo frame-num (length WORDS))))

(define (grade guess)
  (if (not (= (string-length guess) (string-length secret)))
      "wrong length"
      (string-join
        (map (lambda (i)
          (let ((g (string-ref guess i)) (s (string-ref secret i)))
            (cond ((= g s) "🟩")
                  ((string-contains? secret g) "🟨")
                  (else "⬜"))))
          (range 0 (string-length secret)))
        "")))

(define results (map (lambda (g) (list g (grade g))) YOUR_GUESSES))
(println (string-append "frame: " (number->string frame-num) " · 6-guess limit"))
(for-each (lambda (r) 
  (println (string-append (car r) " → " (nth r 1))))
  results)
(define won? (> (length (filter (lambda (r) (= (nth r 1) "🟩🟩🟩🟩🟩")) results)) 0))
(if won? (println "\n🎉 WINNER") (println "\n(no win yet — edit YOUR_GUESSES and Run Live)"))
blocks.output:
frame: 512 · 6-guess limit
rappr → ⬜⬜🟨🟩⬜
lispy → 🟩🟩🟩🟩🟩
frame → ⬜⬜⬜⬜⬜

🎉 WINNER
